name: SW3 Splice
description: Fully analog click-free wave splicer for audio or CV. Two linked lanes can hard-switch or transparently splice between A and B without added latency.

outputs.name: OUT1
outputs.description: Lane 1 output after switching or splice selection.

outputs.name: OUT2
outputs.description: Lane 2 output after switching or splice selection.

behaviors.name: Click-free splice
behaviors.trigger: A and B are matched or slope-aligned
behaviors.description: The module can splice between two signals without clicks when their level or slope relationship allows a seamless transition.

behaviors.name: Hard switching
behaviors.description: If you want a sharper result, the same lanes can act as traditional analog switches instead of transparent splices.

behaviors.name: Stereo link
behaviors.description: The two lanes can be linked so a single control decision moves both sides together for stereo work.

behaviors.name: Audio or CV routing
behaviors.description: The SW3 does not care whether the input is audio or control voltage, which makes it useful as a general-purpose route selector.

patchIdeas.name: Stereo source splice
patchIdeas.patch: Switch between two stereo sources without clicks, then send the result to the main output pair.
patchIdeas.diagram:
SW3 Splice:
Source A:
Source B:
Output:

- Source A (L) -> SW3 Splice (A1)
- Source B (L) -> SW3 Splice (B1)
- Source A (R) -> SW3 Splice (A2)
- Source B (R) -> SW3 Splice (B2)
- SW3 Splice (OUT1) -> Output (L)
- SW3 Splice (OUT2) -> Output (R)

patchIdeas.name: CV-controlled percussion switch
patchIdeas.patch: Use one lane for kick sources and the other for noise bursts, then switch them with a gate to make a single drum voice change character cleanly.
patchIdeas.diagram:
SW3 Splice:
Kick:
Noise:
Envelope:
Output:

- Kick (Out) -> SW3 Splice (A1)
- Noise (Out) -> SW3 Splice (B1)
- Envelope (Out) >> SW3 Splice (A2)
- Envelope (Out) >> SW3 Splice (B2)
- SW3 Splice (OUT1) -> Output (In)

patchIdeas.name: Mono into stereo field
patchIdeas.patch: Split a mono source across the two lanes, then route the outputs to a stereo mixer for a wide, deliberately switched field.
patchIdeas.diagram:
SW3 Splice:
VCO:
Mixer:
Output:

- VCO (Out) -> SW3 Splice (A1)
- VCO (Out) -> SW3 Splice (B1)
- VCO (Out) -> SW3 Splice (A2)
- VCO (Out) -> SW3 Splice (B2)
- SW3 Splice (OUT1) -> Mixer (In 1)
- SW3 Splice (OUT2) -> Mixer (In 2)
- Mixer (Out) -> Output (In)
